title: Mobile user registered on Lens tenant, mobile app data correct
scenario: Lens tenant data (tenant name, tenant ID, user ID, app ID, last connection date) displays correctly in Poly Studio Mobile app under Poly Support/App check for registered user
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the mobile device.
3. Tap the menu icon (hamburger menu) or profile icon to access the side menu.
5. Tap on "App Check" or "App Info" within the Poly Support section.
6. Verify the displayed information on the App Check screen.
expected: The App Check screen displays all of the following fields with correct data matching the Lens tenant registration: app version, tenant name, tenant ID, user ID, app ID, and last connection date.
